context.projectOverview: agent-bober: multi-agent autonomous build harness (TypeScript ESM, NodeNext). This spec adds a new src/hub/ module: the canonical cross-domain Finding schema (owned here), a cross-repo read-only collector, a query-scoped two-pass prioritization judge, a priority.md renderer, and bober hub / bober chat hub CLI surfaces. Sprint 1 is the foundational vertical slice: Finding Zod schema -> FactStoreFindingSource -> `bober hub list`.
relevantFiles: src/fleet/shared-blackboard.ts (findings stored as FactStore rows at predicate 'finding', publish at lines 84-105)
src/cli/commands/memory.ts (list handler + process.exitCode discipline to mirror)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md (read from disk: ESM with .js import extensions, type imports, Zod for validation, vitest collocated tests, no SDK leakage, async fs only, conventional commits bober(sprint-N): ...)
